name: Custom Search API
description: Custom Search API provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to integrate with Google services.

capabilities.name: cse
capabilities.description: Manage cse — returns metadata about the search performed, metadata about the engine used for the search, and the search results. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: cse_siterestrict
capabilities.description: Manage cse siterestrict — returns metadata about the search performed, metadata about the engine used for the search, and the search results. uses a small set of url patterns. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
